# Skill: league-notifications-ads

Use this skill for league notification and ad behavior.

## Notifications

- Support T-24h and start-day notifications.
- Respect user opt-out settings.
- Record sends in notification log to avoid duplicates.

## Ads

- Interstitial shown before first daily play only.
- Persist ad-shown state and enforce once-per-day rule.

## Validation

- Delivery and opt-out test matrix completed
- One-ad-per-day enforcement verified
